The system enables users to submit electricity bill details, track consumption, and initiate approval workflows. Using ServiceNow Flow Designer, the application automates bill validation, approval routing, payment status updates, and notifications. The solution improves transparency, reduces manual effort, and ensures efficient bill processing through a centralized digital platform.</short_description><source>2dc77db0c31632100daeb53ed401313f</source><store_correlation_id/><store_url/><subscription_entitlement/><sys_class_name>sys_app</sys_class_name><sys_code/><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-05 06:01:10</sys_created_on><sys_id>2dc77db0c31632100daeb53ed401313f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-18 13:46:56</sys_updated_on><template/><trackable>true</trackable><uninstall_blocked>false</uninstall_blocked><user_role/><vendor/><vendor_prefix/><version>1.0.0</version></sys_app><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=2dc77db0c31632100daeb53ed401313f"/></record_update>
